message: Thanks for the feedback! We are routing this to the appropriate team for follow-up. cc @JialinXin @vicancy

body:
## 🎯 Agentic Issue Triage

Thank you for your feedback. Tagging and routing to the team member best able to assist.

**Summary:** `WebPubSubServiceClient.ListConnectionsInGroupAsync()` returns a `405 Method Not Allowed` error with `ErrorCode: UnsupportedApiVersion` when called against API version `2024-01-01`. The SDK appears to be using an API version that does not support the `GET` method for listing connections in a group (`/api/hubs/{hub}/groups/{group}/connections`).

<details>
<summary>🔍 Issue Analysis</summary>

**Root Cause Hypothesis:**
The `ListConnectionsInGroupAsync` feature (listing connections within a group) may have been introduced in a **newer API version** than `2024-01-01`. The SDK (`Microsoft.Azure.WebPubSub.AspNetCore 1.5.0`) is targeting `2024-01-01` which either:
1. Predates the addition of this endpoint, or
2. Uses a different HTTP verb for this operation in that API version

**Suggested Debugging Steps:**
- Check what API version `ListConnectionsInGroupAsync` was introduced in (Azure WebPubSub REST API changelog)
- Try updating to the latest `Microsoft.Azure.WebPubSub.AspNetCore` package to see if a newer version targets a higher API version
- If the issue persists on the latest version, the SDK may need to be updated to target a newer REST API version that supports this endpoint

</details>

<details>
<summary>🏷️ Label Selection</summary>

- **Category: `Client`** — This is a bug in the Azure SDK client behavior (using an incorrect/outdated API version)
- **Service: `WebPubSub`** — Package `Microsoft.Azure.WebPubSub.AspNetCore` and `WebPubSubServiceClient` map to the WebPubSub service (`/sdk/webpubsub/`)
- Confidence: **High** — Package name and service are unambiguous

No similar open issues were found for this specific method/API version mismatch.

</details>

<details>
<summary>📦 Relevant Resources</summary>

- [Azure Web PubSub SDK for .NET](https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/tree/main/sdk/webpubsub)
- [Azure Web PubSub REST API reference](https://learn.microsoft.com/rest/api/webpubsub/)
- [WebPubSubServiceClient on NuGet](https://www.nuget.org/packages/Microsoft.Azure.WebPubSub.AspNetCore)

</details>
